summary: Phase 3 testing completed successfully. All 5 new features implemented and working correctly: 1) 'Братство' branding, 2) QuickAddTask at top, 3) Habits with Корисна/Шкідлива labels, 4) Task history with undo, 5) Mission page with cards. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: - Missions CRUD: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE all working
- Mission color options: all 8 colors (purple, blue, emerald, amber, rose, slate, cyan, orange)
- Habits with type: good/bad habits created correctly
- Bad habit tracking reduces HP by 15
- Good habit tracking gives XP and coins
- QuickAddTask positioned at TOP of left column (verified via getBoundingClientRect)
- Mission page: 'Моя Місія' header, 'Нова картка' button
- Mission form: title, description, slogan, 4 image inputs, 8 color options
- Mission card created with images and colored border
- Undo button in history: working, task returns to active list
test_credentials: New users can register via UI. Level 3+ required for Habits/Quests/Mission tabs.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with unique emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 3 features are working. The app has: 1) 'Братство' branding throughout, 2) QuickAddTask at top of left column, 3) Habits with green 'Корисна' and red 'Шкідлива' labels, 4) Task history with undo functionality, 5) Mission page with card creation (title, description, slogan, 4 images, 8 colors). Features unlock at level 3. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_phase3_features.py cover all new APIs.
